name: trilium-presenter
description: Create and manage Trilium Notes slide presentations via ETAPI
long_description: MCP server for Trilium Notes — create presentations, add and edit slides, clone Master slides into Sets, and search notes.

trilium_url.title: Trilium URL
trilium_url.description: Base URL of your Trilium instance (e.g. http://localhost:9160)

trilium_api_key.title: ETAPI Token
trilium_api_key.description: Generate in Trilium: Options → ETAPI → Create new token

default_parent.title: Default Parent Note ID
default_parent.description: Note ID where new presentations are created (use 'root' for the root note)

tools.name: create_presentation
tools.description: Create a new presentation container note

tools.name: list_presentations
tools.description: List presentations under a parent note

tools.name: update_slide
tools.description: Update slide content, title, or type

tools.name: list_slides
tools.description: List all slides in a presentation

tools.name: clone_slide
tools.description: Clone a Master slide into a presentation (Master → Sets)
